title: Set Fire to the Rain
why_this_song: Set Fire to the Rain by Adele (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well, it burned while I cried
'Cause I heard it screaming out your name
I set fire to the rain
And I threw us into the flames

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "knew" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I let it fall, my heart

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It was dark and I was over
They were never true, never true
Sometimes I wake up by the door

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Set Fire to the Rain" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Set Fire to the Rain" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Set Fire to the Rain" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Set Fire to the Rain", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Set Fire to the Rain" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Set Fire to the Rain" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
